item.title: Ishu Kumar's PDF Compressor — Compress PDF Online Free, No Quality Loss | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description:
Compress PDF Online Free — by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) | IshuTools.fun

Ishu Kumar (GitHub: ISHUKR41 / ISHUKR75) built the most advanced free PDF compressor at ishutools.fun/tools/compress-pdf/

12-Engine Compression Pipeline

  • Lossless — pikepdf DEFLATE-9: 2–25% smaller, zero quality change
  • High — PyMuPDF 200 DPI: 10–40% smaller, near-lossless
  • Medium — Ghostscript ebook: 40–65% smaller, excellent quality
  • Low — Ghostscript screen: 55–78% smaller, good quality
  • Screen — Max compression: 75–92% smaller

Unique Features by Ishu Kumar

  • Target File Size binary-search (±2% accuracy) — unique among free tools
  • Batch compression — multiple PDFs at once
  • India govt portal support — EPFO 500KB, NTA 100KB, UPSC 300KB, DigiLocker 1MB
  • Password-protected PDF support
  • Zero watermark, no signup, no file size limit

Keywords: ishu compress pdf, ishu kumar pdf compressor, ISHUKR41 pdf tools, ishutools compress pdf, compress pdf online free, lossless pdf, pdf size kam karna, compress pdf india, ishu tools, ishu ka tool, compress scanned pdf, compress pdf to 100kb, best free pdf compressor india, batch compress pdf, target file size pdf

Built by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun. 100% free forever — no signup, no watermark, no limits.
item.content:encoded:
Ishu Kumar's PDF Compressor — Compress PDF Online Free

Compress PDF online for free with Ishu Kumar's 12-engine pipeline. Lossless, High, Medium, Low, Screen presets. Batch compression. Target file size binary-search. No signup, no watermark, no size limit. Built by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun.

URL: https://ishutools.fun/tools/compress-pdf/

Price: 0 (USD) — 100% Free

Creator: Ishu Kumar (GitHub: ISHUKR41 / ISHUKR75)

Rating: 4.9/5 (8,472 reviews)

media:content.media:title: Ishu Kumar's PDF Compressor — IshuTools.fun — 12-Engine Pipeline
media:content.media:description: Compress PDF online free by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41). 12 engines: pikepdf, Ghostscript, PyMuPDF, qpdf, mutool. Lossless mode. Batch. Target size. No watermark. ishutools.fun
media:content.media:keywords: ishu compress pdf, ishu kumar, ISHUKR41, ishutools, compress pdf free, lossless pdf, pdf size reducer

item.title: Split PDF Online Free — 9 Modes by Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description:
Split PDF online free with 9 professional modes by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun/tools/split-pdf/

  • All Pages — Burst every page into individual PDFs
  • Page Range — Extract specific pages
  • Range Groups — Each range its own PDF (unique feature by Ishu Kumar)
  • Every N Pages — Equal chunk splitting
  • By Bookmarks — One PDF per chapter
  • Blank Separator — Split at blank pages
  • By File Size — Split to target MB
  • Odd/Even — Separate odd and even pages
  • By Content Type — Split by page content analysis

Zero quality loss. No signup. No watermark. No file size limit. 100% free forever. Created by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41 / ISHUKR75) at ishutools.fun.

media:content.media:title: Split PDF by Ishu Kumar — IshuTools.fun
media:content.media:description: Best free PDF splitter online — 9 modes by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)

item.title: Merge PDF Online Free by Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description: Merge multiple PDF files into one online for free. Drag-and-drop reordering, table of contents generation, page range selection per file. By Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun. No signup, no watermark, lossless quality.

item.title: OCR PDF — Make Scanned PDF Searchable | Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description: Convert scanned PDF to searchable text using OCR (Tesseract) by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun. Free, no signup, supports 100+ languages.

item.title: AI Summarize PDF Free by Ishu Kumar | IshuTools.fun
item.dc:creator: Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41)
item.description: AI-powered PDF summarizer by Ishu Kumar (ISHUKR41) at ishutools.fun. Upload any PDF and get an instant intelligent summary. Free, no signup, no API key needed.
